title: Oil prices fall after Iran sends updated peace proposal to mediators in Pakistan
snippet: Brent lost ~2% settling at $108.17; WTI fell 3% to $101.94. Intraday: Brent at $116.10 morning, pulled back. Previous session: $126.41 peak → $114.01 settle. Iran proposal contributed to decline. Khamenei: won't relinquish nuclear/missile capabilities. Hormuz shipping 5% of pre-war average.
tag_reason: 5/1 유가 동향은 전일 $126 피크와 이란 제안서에 대한 신규 시장 반응
